identities.name: Gauss's Law Flux Linkage
identities.logic: Total electric flux through a closed surface is Q/epsilon_0. Common trap: ignoring partial charges or non-enclosed charges.

identities.name: Drift Velocity-Current Bridge
identities.logic: I = nAev_d. Relationship between mobility and relaxation time is a recurring KCET favorite.

identities.name: Biot-Savart Toroid Symmetry
identities.logic: Magnetic field inside a toroid B = μ₀nI. Outside is 0. KCET tests the 'ideal vs real' toroid assumption.

identities.name: Lenz's Law Polarity Trap
identities.logic: Induced EMF direction always opposes the change in flux. Used for direction-based MCQ traps.

identities.name: Snell's Law Critical Angle Mapping
identities.logic: sin(c) = 1/n. Relationship between refractive index and wavelength (Cauchy's formula) is high yield.

identities.name: De-Broglie Duality Shift
identities.logic: lambda = h/p = h/sqrt(2mE). Predicting wavelength change for different ions (e.g., Proton vs Alpha) is a staple.

identities.name: Half-Life Decay Persistence
identities.logic: N = N0 e^(-lambda*t). Quick shortcuts for 1/2, 1/4, 1/8 levels without logarithmic expansion.

identities.name: Logic Gate Boolean Synthesis
identities.logic: De Morgan's Laws for NAND/NOR gate reductions. KCET often masks simple gates with complex diode wiring.

traps.name: Unit-Scaling Obfuscation
traps.description: Mixing cm, micro-Farad, and MHz in a single calculation to bait standard values.

traps.name: Ideal vs Real Transitions
traps.description: Ignoring internal resistance in EMF questions when external resistance is low.

traps.name: Geometrical Approximation Error
traps.description: Using paraxial ray assumptions in Ray Optics where the object distance is large.
